source_jobs.title: Founding Design Engineer
source_jobs.description:
DRYFT

Dryft builds intelligent systems that automate complex human decisions in manufacturing operations

We’re a small, talent-dense team with modest roots and a love for the physical world - cars, machines, planes. Our team includes graduates from Stanford, Berkeley, CDTM, TUM, winners of Stanford TreeHacks, recipients of Fulbright & Haniel scholarships, and builders of everything from robots and race cars to software with millions of downloads.

We’re backed by the founders and leaders behind Amazon, Facebook, Stripe, Applied Intuition, & others; General Catalyst & Neo, and board members of global industrial companies.

Today, we’re already saving customers millions. But this is only the beginning. ERPs ran the physical world for half a century. Dryft is powering the next.




THE ROLE

As Founding Design Engineer, you’ll work directly with our CEO, CTO, and customers to build magical user interfaces for our AI Agents. Your mission is to make the complex intuitive, transforming dense industrial data and decision logic into transparent, high-trust experiences that empower users to act with confidence and speed.




YOU

 - Are an engineer turned designer, or vice versa, or always have been the one on the team understanding the value of easy-to-use interfaces.

 - Shipped production features end-to-end. While stronger in FE, you can handle BE too.

 - Have a strong product sense and enjoy working directly with customers

 - You obsess over design, pay attention to details and are always the first to explore best-in-class products

 - Are ready to work onsite in SF (we support relocation & visa)




TECH STACK

 - FE (TypeScript): React, Chakra UI v3, TanStack Router, TanStack Query, Vite

 - BE (Python): FastAPI with Pydantic v2, SQLModel, PostgreSQL with pgvector, dagster

 - AI: Pydantic AI, Langfuse

source_jobs.title: Founding Forward Deployed Engineer
source_jobs.description:
DRYFT

Dryft builds intelligent systems that automate complex human decisions in manufacturing operations

We’re a small, talent-dense team with modest roots and a love for the physical world - cars, machines, planes. Our team includes graduates from Stanford, Berkeley, CDTM, TUM, winners of Stanford TreeHacks, recipients of Fulbright & Haniel scholarships, and builders of everything from robots and race cars to software with millions of downloads.

We’re backed by the founders and leaders behind Amazon, Facebook, Stripe, Applied Intuition, & others; General Catalyst & Neo, and board members of global industrial companies.

Today, we’re already saving customers millions. But this is only the beginning. ERPs ran the physical world for half a century. Dryft is powering the next.




THE ROLE

This role is our most entrepreneurial. I no other role will you learn more about how to become a great founder, listener & builder.

As our Founding Forward Deployed Engineer, you’ll operate at the intersection of product, engineering, and operations. 50% Engineering, 50% Customer interaction.

 - Design the product backbone. Work hands-on with users, translate their pain into product improvements, and prototype features yourself - ideally writing production code when needed.

 - Turn operations into product. Every deployment becomes a blueprint for scale — you’ll transform learnings into reusable product features, data models, and playbooks that move Dryft from bespoke to productized.

 - Lead full-stack rollouts. Own implementations end-to-end: from scoping and onboarding to integration and training. Align IT teams, engineers, and C-level execs across Germany, the EU, and the US (10–30% travel).

 - Shape how Dryft scales. Work directly with the CEO & CTO to define the product DNA, build the foundation for future teams, and grow into roles like CPO or COO.

This is a high-ownership, zero-handholding role for someone who loves turning complexity into clarity and shipping solutions that just work.




YOU

 - Product architect at heart. You turn ERP frustrations into intuitive features. You care deeply about UX, speed, and simplicity.

 - Sharp mind: You pick up new concepts extremely quickly. You listen. You remember the details - even of things you never heard about.

 - Systems thinker. You design processes that scale - in code, in operations, and in how people work. You think in data and automation.

 - Quality-obsessed. You hold yourself to a high bar, dive deep into problems, and care about getting it right - not just getting it done.

 - Confident communicator. You can calm an impatient exec, convince a skeptical IT leader, and still keep humor in the room.

 - Down-to-earth & relatable. You bond with shop-floor operators as easily as with boardroom execs.

 - Fluent German & English speaker. Our customers are global, and you’ll move between San Francisco, the US Midwest, Mexico and the heart of German manufacturing.




TECH STACK

 - FE (TypeScript): React, Chakra UI v3, TanStack Router, TanStack Query, Vite

 - BE (Python): FastAPI with Pydantic v2, SQLModel, Postgres with pgvector, dagster

 - AI: Pydantic AI, Langfuse

source_jobs.title: Founding Full-Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
DRYFT

Dryft builds intelligent systems that automate complex human decisions in manufacturing operations

We’re a small, talent-dense team with modest roots and a love for the physical world - cars, machines, planes. Our team includes graduates from Stanford, Berkeley, CDTM, TUM, winners of Stanford TreeHacks, recipients of Fulbright & Haniel scholarships, and builders of everything from robots and race cars to software with millions of downloads.

We’re backed by the founders and leaders behind Amazon, Facebook, Stripe, Applied Intuition, & others; General Catalyst & Neo, and board members of global industrial companies.

Today, we’re already saving customers millions. But this is only the beginning. ERPs ran the physical world for half a century. Dryft is powering the next.




THE ROLE

As Founding Fullstack Engineer, you’ll be the brain behind Dryft’s decision intelligence. You’ll build scalable systems that combine agent-based reasoning with mathematical optimization and simulation on top of large-scale industrial data.




YOU

 - Like building scalable, interpretable, data-driven agents from all perspectives - algorithms, architecture and infrastructure.

 - Have a strong product sense and enjoy working directly with customers daily

 - Have shipped production code end-to-end, are strong in backend & infra and comfortable shipping basic frontend features.

 - Have built data-intensive, multi-tenant production systems with Redis, Postgres, and orchestration frameworks. Clickhouse experience is a plus.

 - Are ready to work onsite in SF (we support relocation & visa)




TECH STACK

 - FE (TypeScript): React, Chakra UI v3, TanStack Router, TanStack Query, Vite

 - BE (Python): FastAPI with Pydantic v2, SQLModel, Postgres with pgvector, dagster

 - AI: Pydantic AI, Langfuse

source_jobs.title: Full-Stack Engineering Intern
source_jobs.description:
DRYFT

Dryft builds intelligent systems that automate complex human decisions in manufacturing operations

We’re a small, talent-dense team with modest roots and a love for the physical world - cars, machines, planes. Our team includes graduates from Stanford, Berkeley, MIT, TUM, winners of Stanford TreeHacks, and builders of everything from robots and race cars to software with millions of downloads.

We’re backed by the founders and leaders behind Amazon, Facebook, Stripe, Applied Intuition, & others; General Catalyst & Neo, and board members of global industrial companies.

We’re a no-bullshit, direct-feedback kind of team. People come to Dryft because they want to grow fast, with real responsibility.




THE ROLE

As a Fullstack Engineering Intern, you’ll be the brain behind Dryft’s decision intelligence. You’ll build scalable systems that combine agent-based reasoning with mathematical optimization and simulation on top of large-scale industrial data.

You will work autonomously on your own dedicated projects, often directly with the customer while receiving mentorship from senior engineers that work directly with you. Our early engineers were prior founding/early engineers at venture-backed startups in SF.




YOU

 - Like building scalable, interpretable, data-driven agents from all perspectives - algorithms, architecture and infrastructure.

 - Have a strong product sense and enjoy working directly with customers daily

 - Have shipped production code end-to-end, are strong in backend & infra and comfortable shipping basic frontend features.

 - Are ready to work onsite in SF (we support visa)




TECH STACK

 - FE (TypeScript): React, Chakra UI v3, TanStack Router, TanStack Query, Vite

 - BE (Python): FastAPI with Pydantic v2, SQLModel, Postgres with pgvector, dagster

 - AI: Pydantic AI, Langfuse

notes: small team, talent-dense, backed by prominent founders
